turns.query: Analyze pollution levels and emission impacts between Ligong station and North Pump House station on 2025-06-25, considering nearby enterprise activities.
validation_errors: Custom validator failed: mean_pm25_ligong not set
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 1. 查找Ligong station和North Pump House station的信息
query_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate, station_type, district_id, city_id 
FROM air_quality_station 
WHERE name LIKE '%Ligong%' OR name LIKE '%North Pump%' OR name LIKE '%ligong%' OR name LIKE '%pump%'
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print("站点信息:")
print(stations_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 尝试搜索包含"ligong"或"pump"的站点名（不区分大小写）
query_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate, station_type, district_id, city_id 
FROM air_quality_station 
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%ligong%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%pump%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%north%'
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print("站点信息:")
print(stations_df)

# 同时查看所有站点名称的前100个，看看是否有类似名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station LIMIT 100")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print("\n所有站点名称(前100):")
print(all_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索中文名称 - 理工站和北泵站
query_stations = text("""
SELECT id, name, coordinate, station_type, district_id, city_id 
FROM air_quality_station 
WHERE name LIKE '%理工%' OR name LIKE '%泵站%' OR name LIKE '%北泵%' OR name LIKE '%ligong%'
""")
stations_df = pd.read_sql(query_stations, engine)
print("站点信息:")
print(stations_df)

# 如果没找到，查看所有站点名称
if len(stations_df) == 0:
    query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
    all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
    print(f"\n总站点数: {len(all_stations)}")
    print(all_stations.to_string())

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，寻找Ligong站
query_all = text("SELECT id, name, district_id, city_id FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print("所有站点名称:")
print(all_stations.to_string())

# 同时获取北泵房的详细信息
query_pump = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, aqs.coordinate, aqs.station_type, aqs.district_id, aqs.city_id, 
       d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id = 238
""")
pump_df = pd.read_sql(query_pump, engine)
print("\n北泵房详细信息:")
print(pump_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，寻找Ligong站 - 只打印名称列
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print("所有站点名称:")
print(all_stations.to_string())

# 获取北泵房的详细信息
query_pump = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, aqs.station_type, 
       aqs.district_id, aqs.city_id, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id = 238
""")
pump_df = pd.read_sql(query_pump, engine)
print("\n北泵房详细信息:")
print(pump_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，寻找Ligong站 - 只打印名称列，用head
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)
print(f"总站点数: {len(all_stations)}")
# 搜索包含"理工"或"ligong"的站点
ligong_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('理工|ligong|Ligong', case=False, na=False)]
print(f"找到的理工相关站点: {len(ligong_stations)}")
print(ligong_stations)

# 也搜索包含"北泵"的站点
pump_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('北泵|泵房|pump|Pump', case=False, na=False)]
print(f"\n找到的北泵相关站点: {len(pump_stations)}")
print(pump_stations)

from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索包含"工"的站点
gong_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('工', na=False)]
print(f"\n包含'工'的站点 ({len(gong_stations)}):")
print(gong_stations)

# 获取北泵房的详细信息

SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, aqs.station_type, 
       aqs.district_id, aqs.city_id, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id = 238
""")
pump_df = pd.read_sql(query_pump, engine)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 搜索包含"理工"的站点
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

ligong_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('理工', na=False)]
print(f"包含'理工'的站点 ({len(ligong_stations)}):")
print(ligong_stations)

# 也搜索"ligong"不区分大小写
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    if 'ligong' in row['name'].lower():
        print(f"找到ligong: {row['name']}")

# 查看张家口市的所有站点
query_zjk = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, aqs.station_type, 
       d.name as district_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
WHERE aqs.city_id = 7
ORDER BY aqs.id
""")
zjk_stations = pd.read_sql(query_zjk, engine)
print(f"\n张家口市所有站点 ({len(zjk_stations)}):")
print(zjk_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，搜索可能包含"ligong"拼音的
query_all = text("SELECT id, name, city_id FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 搜索包含"lig"或"ligong"的
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    name_lower = row['name'].lower()
    if 'lig' in name_lower or 'ligong' in name_lower or 'li gong' in name_lower:
        print(f"Found: id={row['id']}, name={row['name']}, city_id={row['city_id']}")

# 查看所有站点名称中是否有英文名称
eng_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains(r'[a-zA-Z]', na=False)]
print(f"\n包含英文字母的站点 ({len(eng_stations)}):")
print(eng_stations)

# 查看张家口市桥西区的站点
query_qx = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE aqs.district_id = (SELECT id FROM district WHERE name = '桥西区' AND city_id = 7)
""")
qx_stations = pd.read_sql(query_qx, engine)
print(f"\n张家口桥西区站点:")
print(qx_stations)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 打印所有站点名称，看看有没有类似"理工"的
print("所有站点名称:")
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    print(f"{row['id']}: {row['name']}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，搜索可能相关的
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 搜索包含"lig" "gon" "li" "gong" 的
keywords = ['lig', 'gon', 'li ', ' gong', 'li工', '理gong']
for kw in keywords:
    found = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains(kw, case=False, na=False)]
    if len(found) > 0:
        print(f"关键词 '{kw}' 找到 {len(found)} 个:")
        print(found)

# 也搜索包含"L"的（可能英文名）
eng = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains(r'[A-Za-z]', na=False)]
print(f"\n包含英文字母的站点: {len(eng)}")
print(eng)

# 查看北泵房附近有哪些站点（张家口桥西区）
query_near = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, 
       ST_Distance(aqs.coordinate, (SELECT coordinate FROM air_quality_station WHERE id=238)) as dist_m
FROM air_quality_station aqs
WHERE aqs.city_id = 7 AND aqs.id != 238
ORDER BY dist_m
LIMIT 20
""")
near_df = pd.read_sql(query_near, engine)
print(f"\n北泵房附近站点:")
print(near_df)

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 打印所有站点名称
names = all_stations['name'].tolist()
print(f"总站点数: {len(names)}")
print("所有站点名称:")
for i, n in enumerate(names):
    print(f"{i}: {n}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称，搜索包含"lig"或"理工"的
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 搜索包含"理"的站点
li_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('理', na=False)]
print(f"包含'理'的站点 ({len(li_stations)}):")
for _, row in li_stations.iterrows():
    print(f"  {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

# 搜索包含"工"的站点
gong_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('工', na=False)]
print(f"\n包含'工'的站点 ({len(gong_stations)}):")
for _, row in gong_stations.iterrows():
    print(f"  {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

# 搜索包含"lig"或"gon"的
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    name_lower = row['name'].lower()
    if 'lig' in name_lower or 'gon' in name_lower:
        print(f"英文匹配: {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 打印所有站点名称，搜索包含"lig"或"gon"的
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    name = row['name']
    name_lower = name.lower()
    # 检查是否包含任何可能的匹配
    if any(c in name_lower for c in ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e', 'f', 'g', 'h', 'i', 'j', 'k', 'l', 'm', 'n', 'o', 'p', 'q', 'r', 's', 't', 'u', 'v', 'w', 'x', 'y', 'z']):
        print(f"id={row['id']}: {name}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 搜索包含"lig"或"理工"或"ligong"的
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    name = row['name']
    # 检查是否包含"lig"（不区分大小写）
    if 'lig' in name.lower() or '理工' in name or 'ligong' in name.lower():
        print(f"Found: id={row['id']}, name={name}")

# 如果没有找到，打印所有站点名称的前100个和后100个
print(f"\n总站点数: {len(all_stations)}")
print("\n前100个站点:")
for _, row in all_stations.head(100).iterrows():
    print(f"  {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

print("\n后100个站点:")
for _, row in all_stations.tail(100).iterrows():
    print(f"  {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看所有站点名称
query_all = text("SELECT id, name FROM air_quality_station ORDER BY id")
all_stations = pd.read_sql(query_all, engine)

# 搜索包含"lig"或"理工"或"ligong"的
found = False
for idx, row in all_stations.iterrows():
    name = row['name']
    if 'lig' in name.lower() or '理工' in name or 'ligong' in name.lower():
        print(f"Found: id={row['id']}, name={name}")
        found = True

if not found:
    print("未找到任何包含'lig'、'理工'或'ligong'的站点")
    
# 搜索包含"工"的站点中是否有"理工"的
gong_stations = all_stations[all_stations['name'].str.contains('工', na=False)]
print(f"\n包含'工'的站点 ({len(gong_stations)}):")
for _, row in gong_stations.iterrows():
    print(f"  {row['id']}: {row['name']}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看河北工业大学站点的详细信息
query_hebut = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, aqs.station_type, 
       aqs.district_id, aqs.city_id, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id = 333
""")
hebut_df = pd.read_sql(query_hebut, engine)
print("河北工业大学站点:")
print(hebut_df)

# 查看北泵房站点的详细信息
query_pump = text("""
SELECT aqs.id, aqs.name, ST_AsText(aqs.coordinate) as coord, aqs.station_type, 
       aqs.district_id, aqs.city_id, d.name as district_name, c.name as city_name
FROM air_quality_station aqs
LEFT JOIN district d ON aqs.district_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN city c ON aqs.city_id = c.id
WHERE aqs.id = 238
""")
pump_df = pd.read_sql(query_pump, engine)
print("\n北泵房站点:")
print(pump_df)

# 查看张家口市桥西区的企业
query_companies = text("""
SELECT pc.id, pc.name, pc.industry_type, ST_AsText(pc.coordinate) as coord
FROM polluting_company pc
WHERE pc.city_id = 7
LIMIT 20
""")
companies_df = pd.read_sql(query_companies, engine)
print(f"\n张家口市企业 (前20):")
print(companies_df)
